main-capability.description: Grants the main window IPC access to Velo's Tauri commands when loaded from the remote Cloudflare Pages origin. Tauri v2 denies IPC to remote content by default, so this is required for push_frame, get_user_config, and save_user_config to work once the window navigates to VELO_PAGES_URL instead of a bundled local frontend. If the Pages domain ever changes away from cetrei.dev, update the remote.urls pattern here to match, since this file cannot read VELO_PAGES_URL from .env.
